title: Cannot login to account
description: Customer is unable to login with correct credentials.

title: Payment failed
description: Payment gateway is declining valid card transactions.

title: Request for refund
description: Customer wants a refund for the last order.

title: Bug in checkout page
description: Error occurs when trying to apply coupon code.

title: Account suspended
description: Customer account has been suspended without notice.

title: Incorrect order delivered
description: Customer received wrong item from recent order.

title: Shipping delay
description: Order is delayed beyond expected delivery date.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Customer cannot reset password via email link.

title: Website not loading
description: Customer reports the website is down on mobile devices.

title: Feature request
description: Customer wants a dark mode option on the dashboard.

title: Invoice not received
description: Customer did not receive invoice via email.

title: App crashing on startup
description: Mobile app crashes immediately after launch.

title: Change billing info
description: Customer wants to update credit card details.

title: Subscription canceled by mistake
description: Customer accidentally canceled subscription and wants it restored.

title: Error applying discount code
description: Discount code is not working on checkout page.
